name: Rahmapfelkuchen (Apple and Rum Custard Cake)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup raisins (soaked in 1/4 cup rum for 30 minutes)
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Mix flour, sugar, and lemon rind in a bowl.
2. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add egg yolk and 1 tablespoon of milk; mix gently to form a dough.
4. Pat the dough into the bottom of a greased 10-inch Springform pan only.
5. Press the dough up the sides of the pan for about 1 inch.
Filling:
6. Toss bread crumbs and melted butter together and spread evenly over the crust.
7. Toss apple slices, lemon juice, and 1/3 cup sugar in a separate bowl.
8. Spread apples over the bread crumbs.
9. Drain raisins (reserving rum) and sprinkle them over the apples.
10. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
11. Bake for 15 minutes.
12. Beat eggs and sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
13. Stir in milk and reserved rum.
14. Pour custard over the apples.
15. Continue baking for 45 to 60 minutes at 350°F (175°C) until the custard is set.
16. Cool completely before serving. Do not remove the springform pan until cool.
